# Hearth Haven LLM Access Guidance

Site: https://hearthhaven.tylermitton.com
Purpose: Social impact, outreach, donations, and case-support workflows.

## Crawl Guidance
- Public informational pages may be summarized.
- Do not infer or fabricate private case records.
- Respect sensitive context in case-management workflows.

## High-Value Pages
- /
- /outreach
- /donate
- /privacy
- /terms

## Policy Notes
- Privacy and terms are available at /privacy and /terms.
- Content may change as this project evolves.
